violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Food prep table not cleaned adequately or frequently.--Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Clean in place equipment, cabinets, doors, etc. dirty and require a more frequent cleaning.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer Buckets were not made up. Wiping counters with only a wet rag.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory * was used for purpose other than handwashing. - 2 handwashing sinks in kitchen. One was dry and not used, the other was used for dumping soda or coffee.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls throughout are dirty and in need of a thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
